zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wayte於1445年2月3日出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德時，她的父親Thomas Wyatt33歲，母親Joan de Grene27歲。她於1464年之前與Mr Lucy結婚。她去世於1502年2月11日在英國素瑞貝爾蒙享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏溫莎女爵。

nameMeanings.name: Wayte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Waite
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a watchman, either in a town or castle, from Anglo-Norman French waite ‘watchman, member of the watch’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Wachter ). In the Middle Ages the town waits typically combined the functions of watchmen and musicians through being trumpeters or pipers. There may also have been some late confusion with White or Wheat .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wayte was born on 3 February 1445, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Wyatt, was 33 and her mother, Joan de Grene, was 27. She married Mr Lucy before 1464. She died on 11 February 1502, in Bermondsey, Surrey, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Windsor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Westminster Palace, London, England: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Wayte est née le 3 février 1445, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Wyatt, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan de Grene, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Mr Lucy avant 1464. Elle est décédée le 11 février 1502, à Bermondsey, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Windsor, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Westminster Palace, London, England: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Wayte am 3. Februar 1445 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wyatt 33 und ihre Mutter Joan de Grene 27. Sie hat vor 1464 Mr Lucy geheiratet. Sie starb am 11. Februar 1502 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Bermondsey, Surrey, England und wurde in Windsor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wayte(이)가 1445년 2월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wyatt(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Grene(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1464년 이전 Mr Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1502년 2월 11일 영국 수리 버몽시에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 윈드소르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wayte nasceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1445, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Wyatt, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Grene, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Mr Lucy antes 1464. Ela faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1502, em Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wayte родилась 3 февраля 1445 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Wyatt было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Grene, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Mr Lucy перед 1464 г. Она умерла 11 февраля 1502 г. в местности бирмондси, сурри, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности виндзор, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
